content: I will create an implementation plan detailing the changes to redirect queries on the mobile app's Puja page from the store items (`website_pooja_products` table) to actual general pujas (`general_poojas` table).
thinking:
**Analyzing the Mapping**

I'm focused on the necessary mapping within `app/(tabs)/puja.tsx`. Currently, I'm analyzing the `loadGeneralPoojas` function and its data fetching from Supabase. I'm aiming to determine the precise data transformation required to effectively render the puja information within the UI.


**Verifying Database Connections**

I'm now cross-referencing the database table and subscription channel in `app/(tabs)/puja.tsx` and correcting the table name for realtime updates to `general_poojas`. The thought process has expanded to check `app/all_pujas.tsx`, ensuring consistency and real-time data sync using Supabase Realtime across multiple components. Now I'll check `app/puja_detail.tsx`.


**Mapping the Puja Data**

I've been looking closely at the data mapping logic in `app/puja_detail.tsx`, particularly around the fallback mechanism for data retrieval. I've realized that the `isWebsiteProduct` check, used to distinguish between data from `website_pooja_products` and `general_poojas`, correctly handles the field discrepancies (like `title` vs. `name`). Now, I'm checking the mapping using `setPuja` to ensure data from `general_poojas` is correctly transformed to the UI fields.

args.ArtifactMetadata: {"ArtifactType":"implementation_plan","RequestFeedback":true,"Summary":"Implementation plan to resolve the Puja page showing Store Items issue. Redirects general puja queries from the store table (website_pooja_products) to the correct pujas table (general_poojas) across relevant files, aligning their model formatting."}
args.CodeContent:
"# Implementation Plan - Fix Puja Page Showing Store Items

The mobile app's Puja page currently lists products like "13 Mukhi Rudraksha" under the "All Puja" section. These items are store products fetched from the `website_pooja_products` database table. Instead, the page should fetch and display actual pujas from the `general_poojas` table (such as "Kedarnath Puja", "Tirupati Puja", etc.).

## Proposed Changes

### Mobile App Code base

#### [MODIFY] [puja.tsx](file:///Applications/sahil_MP_app/APP/mantrapuja/app/(tabs)/puja.tsx)
- Modify `loadGeneralPoojas` to query from `general_poojas` instead of `website_pooja_products`.
- Update the columns mapping so that:
  - `title` maps to `p.title`
  - `originalPrice` maps directly to `p.original_price`
  - `offerPrice` and `price` map directly to `p.offer_price`
  - `rating` maps to `p.rating`
  - `reviews` maps to `p.reviews`
  - `provider` maps to `p.provider`
  - `description` maps to `p.tagline`
  - `image` maps to `p.image_url`
- Update the realtime subscription channel `generalSubscription` to listen to changes on the `general_poojas` table.

#### [MODIFY] [all_pujas.tsx](file:///Applications/sahil_MP_app/APP/mantrapuja/app/all_pujas.tsx)
- Modify `loadGeneralPoojas` to query from `general_poojas` instead of `website_pooja_products`.
- Update the columns mapping accordingly to use `general_poojas` schema.
- Update the realtime subscription channel `productsSubscription` to listen to the `general_poojas` table.

#### [MODIFY] [puja_detail.tsx](file:///Applications/sahil_MP_app/APP/mantrapuja/app/puja_detail.tsx)
- In the `loadPujaDetails` effect, add `general_poojas` table as a fallback query option after checking `one_rupee_poojas` and before checking `website_pooja_products` (or replacing/inserting it in the fallback logic).
- Since `general_poojas` does not have a `name` column, the existing `isWebsiteProduct` check (`const isWebsiteProduct = ('name' in dbData)`) will correctly evaluate to `false` and map the fields approp
<truncated 758 bytes>
args.Description: "Creating implementation plan to redirect puja page queries from website_pooja_products to general_poojas"
